scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter shared --filter server --filter web run test
scripts.postinstall:
chmod +x node_modules/.pnpm/node-pty@*/node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null; echo '
  Run pnpm setup to configure your environment.
'
